title: girls trip to budapest | hungarian food, river cruise & thrifting

questions.question: What did the speaker buy at the vintage store?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[295.6s-322.8s]，她在vintage店买了一件皮衣(leather jacket)，她非常喜欢这个颜色。

questions.question: What does 'clicked' mean in 'we immediately clicked'?
questions.explanation: 'Click' 在这里是俚语，意为'一拍即合'、'立刻产生好感'，形容两人立刻成为朋友。

questions.question: What is 'prosecco'?
questions.explanation: Prosecco是意大利起泡酒，字幕[667.3s-686.0s]提到她们买了prosecco准备去探索和骑自行车。

questions.question: What traditional Hungarian food did they try?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[405.8s-412.7s]，她们吃了传统匈牙利食物Chicken paprikas（匈牙利辣鸡），还有[363.9s-370.3s]提到的餐厅。

questions.question: What does 'freshen up' mean in the context?
questions.explanation: 'Freshen up' 在这里指化轻妆让自己看起来更有精神，字幕[138.5s-143.6s]说'I'm not gonna put on a lot of makeup just a little bit to freshen up'。

questions.question: Where is Mattea (the friend) from?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[20.0s-25.3s]和[161.6s-168.9s]，Mattea来自冰岛，虽然她住在荷兰，但她是冰岛人。

questions.question: What problem did they have with the bicycles?
options: B) They couldn't return the bikes in time
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[759.8s-764.5s]，他们不能及时归还自行车，需要额外付费。

questions.question: What does 'Posh' mean as described about the area?
questions.explanation: 'Posh' 意思是高档的、优雅的。字幕[820.8s-826.7s]提到服务员说这个区域比较高档。

questions.question: How long did they stay in Budapest?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[148.0s-154.3s]，她们住了三个晚上(three nights)，星期天离开。

questions.question: What does 'turtleneck' refer to?
questions.explanation: 'Turtleneck' 指高领毛衣，字幕[602.7s-614.0s]提到她觉得这件衣服是完美的冬季毛衣。

questions.question: What was the weather like during their trip?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[30.2s-36.2s]和[36.2s-41.9s]，她们没想到九月天气这么热，达到了26度，非常热(heat is insane)。

questions.question: What does 'figure out' mean in 'we just figured out we downloaded some app'?
questions.explanation: 'Figure out' 意思是弄明白、解决。字幕[686.0s-694.1s]说他们下载了一个应用程序来解决自行车问题。

questions.question: What are the two parts of Budapest mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 布达佩斯由多瑙河两岸的Buda（布达）和Pest（佩斯）两部分组成，字幕[733.1s-739.7s]明确提到。

questions.question: What is 'salmonella' related to in the conversation?
questions.explanation: Salmonella是沙门氏菌，会导致食物中毒。字幕[449.5s-456.1s]提到鱼在水里泡了16小时，避免沙门氏菌。

questions.question: What does 'coordinating our outfits' mean?
options: C) Going to a fashion show
questions.explanation: 'Coordinate outfits' 指搭配服装，使穿着风格协调。字幕[258.4s-295.6s]提到她们在搭配协调的服装。

questions.question: What kind of restaurant is 'Tati' mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕[363.9s-370.3s]，Tati是一家提供传统匈牙利食物的餐厅，如chicken paprikas。

questions.question: Why did they decide to rent bikes?
options: B) The Airbnb host offered them bikes
questions.explanation: 字幕[686.0s-694.1s]提到他们的Airbnb房东给他们提供了自行车，所以他们决定租车骑行。

questions.question: What brand were the cute high heels from?
questions.explanation: 字幕[504.5s-515.0s]提到那些可爱的高跟鞋是Billy Bee品牌的。

questions.question: Describe the girl's trip to Budapest. What activities did they do?
questions.referenceAnswer: They visited Budapest with their friend Mattea, tried traditional Hungarian food like chicken paprikas, went thrifting and vintage shopping, rented bikes to explore the city, and enjoyed a river cruise area. They stayed for three nights.
questions.hint: Try to include: traditional food, shopping, bikes, friend Mattea, duration of stay

questions.question: What traditional Hungarian food would you like to try after watching this video? Explain why.
questions.referenceAnswer: The video mentions chicken paprikas and other traditional Hungarian dishes at restaurant Tati. The speaker should mention at least one dish and explain their interest.
questions.hint: You can mention: chicken paprikas, langos, goulash, or other Hungarian specialties

questions.question: What do you think 'thrifting' means? Have you ever been thrifting? Describe your experience.
questions.referenceAnswer: Thrifting means shopping at vintage or second-hand stores to find unique items at lower prices. The video shows the speaker finding a cute top and a leather jacket.
questions.hint: Try to use words like: vintage store, second-hand, unique, affordable

questions.question: Describe a problem they faced during their trip and how they solved it.
questions.referenceAnswer: One problem was the bicycle issue - they couldn't return the bikes on time and had to pay extra. They also had to download an app to use the bikes. Another issue was finding a nice cafe for breakfast.
questions.hint: Think about: the bicycle problem, time management, app usage

questions.question: If you were planning a trip with your best friend, what would you consider? Mention at least three things.
questions.referenceAnswer: Based on the video, considerations might include: weather and packing appropriate clothes, finding good local food, planning activities like shopping or exploring, budget and accommodation, transportation options.
questions.hint: You can mention: weather, food, activities, budget, accommodation, transportation

questions.question: What was the name of the friend traveling with the speaker?
questions.explanation: 字幕[0.2s-20.0s]明确提到她的朋友叫Mattea，她们一起来布达佩斯旅行。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'the heat is insane'?
options: A) The heat is very comfortable
B) The heat is extremely hot
questions.explanation: 'Insane' 在口语中意为'极其的、疯狂的'，用来形容天气非常热，出乎她们的意料。
